untranslatable_reason: Signal requires measuring 'pullback depth as percentage of prior advance' and 'pullback structure complexity' (simple vs multi-leg). These require custom bar-sequence analysis and advance/decline measurement not available in the allowed indicator set. Price position (price_pos_20) and body percentage are imperfect proxies. The core concept of detecting buyer commitment through pullback structure requires indicators beyond those provided.
translation_notes: Used price_pos_20 > 0.3 to approximate shallow pullbacks within 20-period range (above 30th percentile = shallow retrace). Used body_pct < 0.5 to approximate 'simple structure' (small bodies suggest less complex legs). Exit when price_pos_20 < 0.2 approximates deeper pullback threshold. Close below prior low detects structural breakdown. Signal is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because entry is only valid during uptrends, requiring external regime confirmation.
